LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF JOHN LYNCH'S MOTION TO DISMISS RELATED SHAREHOLDER DERIVATIVE ACTIONS IS CONTINUED FOR HEARING TO APRIL 26, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO DROP OFF DOCUMENTATION RE: BANKRUPTCY BY APRIL 24, 2013 AND GIVE NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2013 Off Calendar

Plaintiff John Lynch'S Motion To Dismiss Related Shareholder Derivative Actions
Off Calendar Apr-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. FRANCIS A. BOTINI OF BOTINI & BOTINI INCORPORATED, TEL. NO. (858) 914-2001 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - Plaintiffs John Lynch and Jim Giommi's Motion To Dismiss Related Shareholder Derivative Actions IS GRANTED WITH PREJUDICE. The moving party provided the Court with further documentation regarding the bankruptcy by way of e-mail prior to the hearing. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Dismiss Related Shareholder Derivative Actions
Off Calendar Apr-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: francis a. bottini, esq., 858.914.2001, for plaintiff john lynch; No other appearances.

JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSES THAT SHE KNOWS MS. A. ERICKSON-WHITE, ESQ. FROM HER FORMER EMPLOYMENT AT MORRISON FOERSTER LLP FROM 1997-2005 BUT DOES NOT BELIEVE THIS WILL AFFECT HER ABILITY TO BE IMPARTIAL IN THIS CASE.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. The Court VACATED its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JOHN LYNCH'S MOTION To Dismiss Related Shareholder Derivative Actions IS CONTINUED FOR HEARING TO APRIL 26, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO DROP OFF DOCUMENTATION RE: BANKRUPTCY BY APRIL 24, 2013 AND GIVE NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
